classifications.label: REAL
classifications.note: The refund path still checks the paid status before mutating the invoice. A status-value rename must update this guard.
classifications.remediation: Update the refund guard and add a regression test for paid-to-refunded transitions.

classifications.label: GHOST
classifications.note: The capture path already requires the invoice to be paid and not cancelled.

spec_mutations: Add a refund-transition test before renaming billing status values.
decision_rationale: One real refactor risk is present and has a concrete remediation.
